patterns.comment: Model alias after Ask/Using model/Define model
patterns.name: support.function.model-alias.fluent
keyword.control.end.fluent
patterns.match: \b(End loop|End while|End parallel|End of|End repeat|End unless|End using|End match|End test|End validate|End when|End schedule|End parallel loop)\b

patterns.name: keyword.control.error.fluent
patterns.match: \b(Try to|If that fails|If that also fails|Stop with error)\b

patterns.name: keyword.operator.clause.fluent
patterns.match: \b(be|is|are|to|by|of|in|as|at|on|from|for|with|and|or|not|then|where|through|using|and call the result|and call the outcome|be the result of|the result of|and return the result|and stream the result|and stream each chunk)\b

patterns.name: keyword.other.input-kind.fluent
patterns.match: \b(using text|using data|using image|using images|using audio|using video|using document|using context|using question|using schema|using previous draft)\b

patterns.name: keyword.operator.comparison.fluent
patterns.match: \b(is greater than|is less than|is at least|is at most|is greater than or equal to|is less than or equal to|is not|contains|does not contain|exists|does not exist|is empty|is not empty|ascending|descending|asc|desc)\b

patterns.name: support.function.string.fluent
patterns.match: \b(uppercase of|lowercase of|slugify|truncate|the length of|the word count of|split .+ by|join .+ with|capitalize|title case|the first \d+ characters of|the last \d+ characters of|replace .+ with .+ in|trim)\b

patterns.name: support.function.math.fluent
patterns.match: \b(round|floor of|ceiling of|absolute value of|square root of|to the power of|the minimum of|the maximum of|a random number between|percentage of)\b

patterns.name: support.function.list.fluent
patterns.match: \b(the sum of|the average of|the first item of|the last item of|the count of|unique items from|a range from|shuffle|sample from|reverse)\b

patterns.name: support.function.date.fluent
patterns.match: \b(the current date|the current datetime|days between|formatted as|plus \d+ days|plus \d+ hours)\b

patterns.name: support.function.type.fluent
patterns.match: \b(converted to|parsed as JSON|stringified as JSON|the type of)\b
